title: Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act, 25 U.S.C. Chapter 46 (correct codification)
publication_intent: Official U.S. House Office of the Law Revision Counsel codification endpoint; corrects src-bl-028, whose chapter-33 URL retrieved the National Indian Forest Resources Management Act (ds3-d catalog record bl-028 needs-human-review).
discovered_via: Director correction registration after ds3-d content-mismatch finding on src-bl-028
notes: ISDEAA is codified at 25 U.S.C. ch. 46 (SS5301 et seq.), not ch. 33.
